unlockedvoidsea.config.dimension.tooltip: The dimension to enable the void sea in (e.g., minecraft:overworld)
unlockedvoidsea.config.startY.tooltip: The Y-level where the purple fog and buoyancy begin
unlockedvoidsea.config.depthGradient.too: How strong the buoyancy is. 1.0 is standard.
unlockedvoidsea.config.drag.tooltip: Multiplier for water-like resistance. 1.0 is standard.
unlockedvoidsea.config.priority.tooltip: Higher priority overrides other void sea definitions for the same dimension.
unlockedvoidsea.configuration.title: Unlocked Void Sea
